properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v2 v4 v2

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: We've lingered on this mountain for too long Let's walk worthy of the calling, Take our position in God's word Under Joshua commission, adopted sons in the Ephesians So take up on the armor of God O little eagles, we're now led by the Dove.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: We are the final voice, Mighty Gentile warriors From dust to stars, chosen ones In His image we will stand. For we are She and She is Him, riding this trail again The culmination of the Book of Acts In the second ride, we are the revival.

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: The prophet had a vision Standing in the sun "When the evening shadows fall You'll be back again Will there be another revival, Will I see another time? From the West will come the White Horse rider I will ride this trail again.

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: When the enemy comes in like a flood Fills our mind with fear and doubt We'll stand undefiled, our robes pure and white The Lord has risen up a standard!
